title: brachypodium peregrinum
intro: Brachypodium peregrinum, also known as false brome, is a perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Brachypodium peregrinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
